description:
Create a new Email Template in Vtiger CRM named 'Standard Post-Demo Follow-up' for the 'Contacts' module. Set the description to 'Follow-up template for sales reps after completing a product demo.' and the subject to 'Following up on our demonstration'. The template body must use dynamic merge tags for the bracketed fields in the following message:

Hi [Contact First Name],

Thank you for attending our product demonstration today. I hope you found the session informative and that it addressed your team's needs.

Please let me know if you have any further questions.

Best regards,
[Assigned User First Name] [Assigned User Last Name]
[Assigned User Office Phone]

metadata.static_text: Thank you for attending our product demonstration today
